MODULE: cosmos.core.multimodal.multimodal_fusion
FILE: cosmos/core/multimodal/multimodal_fusion.py (193 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: MULTIMODAL FUSION
=================
Unifies audio, visual, and text into single 12D representation.

CLASSES:
- MultimodalLightToken: Unified token for audio + vision + text
  Methods: def cross_modal_resonance(self)
- UnifiedMultimodalSystem: Complete system integrating all modalities
  Methods: def process_multimodal_input(self, audio=None, image=None, text=None)
  Methods: def get_modulated_parameters(self)
